title: 2007-2021 Toyota Tundra Wheel Speed Sensor And Connector Replacement
description: Master Technician shows the DIY how-to removal, service and installation procedure of a broken wheel speed sensor and corroded connector. Fault codes present could be C1330, C1331, C1332, C1333, C0200, C0205, C0210, C0215.
